judge_reason: Description A provides specific, readable stamp text ('JUN 13 1949', 'BY', 'PB', 'HANDLED' or 'RECEIVED') while Description B describes the same stamps as 'illegible' or a 'CLASSIFIED' stamp, creating a direct contradiction on quoted text content.
